name: bahuckel
description: Decentralized, open-source voice and text chat with E2EE

scripts.dev:exe: npm run build && npm run dev:server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bahuckel/shared && npm run build -w @bahuckel/server && npm run build -w @bahuckel/client && node scripts/copy-emoji-to-dist.mjs && node scripts/copy-client-to-release.mjs && npm run build:server-gui
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w @bahuckel/server
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/kill-bahuckel-for-build.mjs && node scripts/generate-multisize-icon.mjs && npx electron-builder --win && node scripts/apply-icon-win-unpacked.mjs
scripts.dist:win:zip: node scripts/kill-bahuckel-for-build.mjs && node scripts/generate-multisize-icon.mjs && npx electron-builder --win zip --x64 && node scripts/apply-icon-win-unpacked.mjs
scripts.build:portable-client: npm run build && npm run dist:win:zip
scripts.build:client-exe: npm run build && npm run dist:win
scripts.build:server-gui: node scripts/apply-electron-builder-patches.mjs && node scripts/ensure-sql-wasm.mjs && npm run build:server-exe:skip-build && npm exec -- electron-builder --project=server-gui
scripts.build:all-exe: npm run build && npm run dist:win && npm run build:server-gui
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run dist:win && npm run build:server-gui
scripts.release:exe: npm run use-local-emoji && npm run build:server-exe
